positive: A whimsical, symmetrical illustration of forest spirits and glowing mushrooms under a crescent moon. The central motif features stylized, anthropomorphic flora and fauna with clean, dark silhouettes against a gradient background of twilight purples, deep indigos, and ethereal teal. Emphasis on strong, decorative lines and stylized patterns (like Art Deco meets stained glass), creating a mystical, high-contrast scene. The overall composition should be highly centered and perfectly balanced, suitable for a repeating or single-placement apparel print. --ar 1:1
negative: blur, noisy, low quality, grain, jpeg artifacts, watermark, text, logo, signature, misplaced limbs, deformed, bad anatomy, messy, grunge, photo, realism
